characters.description: The demonic tree who rules Ashfallen from Red Vine Peak. As this volume opens, Ashlock begins a concealed ascent to Nascent Soul while trying to shield his territory from outside attention.
characters.name: Ashlock

characters.description: The senior leader of the Redclaw family and an established ally of Ashfallen. He is a veteran cultivator whose family has supported Ashlock's growing sect.
characters.name: Magnus Redclaw

characters.description: A protected cultivator whose valuable bloodline has drawn Vincent's attention. Her safety is a central concern for Ashlock and for those who know what the Blood Lotus patriarch does to rare bloodlines.
characters.name: Stella

characters.description: The Blood Lotus patriarch and head of the Nightrose family. He sustains his failing vessel by taking rare bloodlines and orders Stella captured when he judges her ready for harvest.
characters.name: Vincent Nightrose

characters.description: Ashlock's divine spider companion and one of Stella's protectors. Larry enters the forming inner world with her and recognizes that its appearance at Nascent Soul is highly unusual.
characters.name: Larry

characters.description: The disciplinary committee's Grand Elder whom Vincent orders to seize Stella. At his introduction, Valandor serves as the patriarch's feared enforcer.
characters.name: Valandor

characters.description: Valandor remembers Stella's unnamed father using sap from the World Tree to break Vincent's hold over him.
characters.name: Stella's Father

characters.description: Stella's close ally, who may also attract Vincent because of her unusual bloodline. She leaves Red Vine Peak with Stella when concealment becomes necessary.
characters.name: Diana

characters.description: The Eternal Pursuit Pavilion's Celestial Warden in the Tainted Cloud Sect. He recognizes a possible link between Stella and another recorded Crestfallen cultivator.
characters.name: Tiberius

characters.description: A former enemy whom Stella reports is alive and being made to repent within Ashfallen. That guarded account is all outsiders are permitted to know when Nox first enters this volume's story.
characters.name: Nox

characters.description: A Voidmind-born Ashfallen strategist who accompanies Valandor and Larry to the Voidmind residence.
characters.name: Elaine

characters.description: Elaine's father and the Grand Elder of the Voidmind family. When Elaine confronts him, Ashlock's cursed sap has already begun changing his body.
characters.name: Voidmind Grand Elder

characters.description: A Voidmind elder from the faction responsible for removing Elaine's mother. Natalia admits that Elaine and Dante's branch took the blame, then bargains for a way to break the family's cultivation curse. Elaine tricks her into the Void Tree gateway, where the Void kills her.
characters.name: Elder Natalia

characters.description: Elaine's mother, recovered alive at the conquered Voidmind residence. She is an elder with a long and complicated family history, and her distrust of Valandor is immediate.
characters.name: Morrigan

characters.description: The familiar name Elaine's mother permits Ashlock's allies to use. Morgan is Morrigan, the elder recovered from the Voidmind residence, and she agrees to conceal Ashlock's takeover while remaining there.
characters.name: Morgan

characters.description: A four-armed Void Ent created from Elder Natalia's corpse. Chaos kills an elder who attempts to flee the conquered Voidmind residence.
characters.name: Chaos

characters.description: A powerful worldwalking ally who appears in human form among Ashlock's forces at the Voidmind residence. Elaine already knows Maple through his siblings.
characters.name: Maple

characters.description: An oath-bound underworld leader who helps Ashfallen control its city and suppress reports of activity on Red Vine Peak. His organization gives the growing sect a discreet local network.
characters.name: Choi

characters.description: A Mudcloak leader and builder assigned to help Stella organize Ashlock’s worship campaign.
characters.name: Douglas

characters.description: A member of the Duskwalker household whom Nox asks to meet. Her connection to Nox brings her into Ashfallen's affairs as the sect prepares its Mystic Realm expedition.
characters.name: Evelyn

characters.description: Stella’s young nature-cultivator disciple, assigned to help with Ashlock’s new worship campaign.
characters.name: Jasmine

characters.description: A village youth whom Stella rescued from a monster and helped begin cultivation. He attends the All-Seeing Eye's first service after receiving the resources needed to perceive and cycle Key.
characters.name: Sam

characters.description: The unnamed deputy who introduces Stella as head priestess during the All-Seeing Eye's first public service. The vice leader helps present the cult's new order to its mortal recruits.
characters.name: All-Seeing Eye vice leader

characters.description: Ashfallen's healing light Ent, assigned to protect Jasmine during her first Mystic Realm expedition.
characters.name: Sol

characters.description: A seasoned Star Core member of Redclaw who regularly enters Mystic Realms. Stella presents her as the standard Jasmine may one day be expected to overcome.
characters.name: Amber

characters.description: A renowned Redclaw elder whose spirit fire came from a Mystic Realm inheritance. His achievement is cited while Ashfallen's members choose their own pocket realms.
characters.name: Elder Mo

characters.description: A masked Spatial Peak disciple in an Azure clan tournament realm. As Elder Vortexian's daughter and a scheduled competitor, she offers Stella a dangerous route into the event.
characters.name: Lyra

characters.description: Lyra's father and an elder of the Azure clan's Spatial Peak. His masked daughter is scheduled to fight in the clan tournament when Stella takes her place.
characters.name: Elder Vortexian

characters.description: The deceased ruler of the Azure clan's Spatial Peak. His long-concealed death threatens the peak's position, while the damaged Origin Stone he left behind becomes the focus of Vortexian's plans.
characters.name: Heavenly King Cepheus

characters.description: A shadow titan created from a Shadow Sovereign's remains. Hades is Ashlock's strongest Ent at introduction, though his full strength depends on a continuing supply of Shadow Key.
characters.name: Hades

characters.description: A former tomb guardian remade as Ashlock's Shadow Lich Ent. Ashlock names him Anubis before the expedition passes through the concealed rift.
characters.name: Anubis

characters.description: The Celestial Star Dragon, a peak Nascent Soul monster and one of the primal overlords. He wakes early when a spiritual spring begins losing Key at an alarming rate.
characters.name: Astralis

characters.description: A Silverspire cultivator who returns from the Mystic Realm at Silver Corps, the Silverspire equivalent of Star Core. He joins the many allies displaying major gains after the expedition.
characters.name: Ryker

characters.description: A Redclaw cultivator who lures a fire drake toward fellow expedition members, takes property from the dead, and helps hide the killings. Ashlock transforms her into a tree as punishment.
characters.name: Isabella

characters.description: A Redclaw cultivator who helps conceal the deaths of fellow expedition members. Ashlock transforms him into a tree for his part in the betrayal.
characters.name: Terrence

characters.description: A Redclaw cultivator who helps conceal the deaths of fellow expedition members. Ashlock transforms him into a tree for his part in the betrayal.
characters.name: Nathan

characters.description: An earth-aligned Soul Fire cultivator sharing temporary quarters with Sam. Formerly part of the Iron Fist Brotherhood, Hugo supplies him with a beast core taken from a peak Soul Fire monster.
characters.name: Hugo

characters.description: A knowledge-inscribing ally asked to transfer a soul-anchor technique to Ashlock. The assignment is intended to provide an emergency means of recovering a threatened soul.
characters.name: Quill

characters.description: A peak Soul Fire outsider from the Abyssal Tide Sect who comes to Ashfallen City searching for her sect's stolen stone. Resentful of favored disciples, she intends to claim its benefits for herself.
characters.name: Serena Blacktide

characters.description: A mortal believer in the All-Seeing Eye who confronts an outsider after she damages one of Ashlock's roots. Serena kills him when he warns her away from the trees.
characters.name: Old Bill

characters.description: Serena Blacktide's false identity among the tournament entrants. As Daisy, she claims to be a weaker cultivator looking for a missing sister and accepts Jasmine's offer of help.
characters.name: Daisy

characters.description: A Soul Fire tournament entrant from the Starweaver family who wields a cosmic affinity. She approaches Stella to ensure the arena's protective shields can withstand her attacks.
characters.name: Celeste Starweaver

characters.description: An unnamed hostile creature released from a trading-company employee's spatial ring. It submits to Stella after she overpowers it and becomes her pet.
characters.name: Stella's Pet Creature

characters.description: A small unnamed creature that gives Sam a dubious scripture he believes is cultivation instruction.
characters.name: Blue-Eyed Creature
